'''Bens Figg''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who, in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], served in [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mils Giel]]'s expedition to investigate the formerly [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]-held [[Golrath Station]]. Considered future officer material from his earliest days at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], Figg graduated top of his class, while excelling athletically and also enjoying popularity with the female students. Figg was expected to become the youngest-ever member of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] after completing his rookie tour of duty on [[Golrath/Legends|Golrath]], where he and former Academy roommate [[Tabbins Vee]] were assigned to guard the station's [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]]. However, none of that came to pass—Figg was surprised and incapacitated by Rebel [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] while on duty, and was caught in the explosion when Organa destroyed the facility shortly afterward.<ref name="marvel65" />
